notes: The merge script reported zero mechanical fixes: Input and Output are both 95 nodes and 168 edges, indicating all LLM batch outputs used correct ID prefixes and valid type/complexity values from the start.

Node type distribution looks reasonable: file, function, class, document, config nodes all use correct prefixes. No systemic LLM output anomalies detected.
The graph correctly covers all project source files including the newer M3 modules (commit_fix.py, src/commit/patcher.py, src/commit/svn.py) and their internal functions.
